desc: Integrate the dwc3-apple USB driver work (t6040-usb-wip: force-device-mode + force-host, gadget bring-up 8bb4d2d) with the mainline bring-up branch (feature/m4-m5-minimal-device-trees) so one branch builds a bootable USB image. A USB_HOST build on t6040-usb-wip applied the force-host patch OK but failed the mainline-required t6040-pmgr-t6041-quirks.patch; neither branch alone builds. Blocks ticket 032 (usb-root artifacts). Rebase usb-wip onto mainline or cherry-pick the dwc3-apple commits forward; then rebuild USB_HOST=1.
author: claude
